title: MODEL-FLOWS output — ordered component-to-component flows per slice

aprd_ref.description: Resolved path to frozen aPRD artifact

lock_verified.description: True if lock present and names frozen artifact

mode.description: skeleton = walking-skeleton flow; increment = per-slice flow

base_flows_ref.description: Path to frozen skeleton flows.json (increment mode)

base_contracts_ref.description: Path to frozen skeleton contracts.json (increment mode)

skeleton_frozen_verified.description: True if skeleton.lock present and status==frozen

introduced_components.description: C* ids slice first activates (increment mode)

touched_components.description: Introduced plus reused components on slice path (increment mode)

composes_against_contracts.description: True if every inter-component hop maps to existing CT* and every foundational seam is crossed (skeleton mode)

composes_against_frozen_contracts.description: True if every inter-component hop maps to CT* present in slice touched_contracts (increment mode)

flows.description: Skeleton: exactly one walking-skeleton flow. Increment: exactly one flow per slice

id.description: Flow id; F1 for skeleton, F<slice_ordinal> for increment

path.description: Ordered C* ids happy path traverses; ingress to persistence

steps.description: One step per hop in traversal order; executes contract on paper

via.description: CT* id for this hop; null for external boundary

external.description: True if crossing to external system with no modeled CT*

via.description: All inter-component CT* happy path composes against; externals excluded

failure_path.description: Load-bearing failure variant drawn from a touched CT* declared failure_mode

arrives_at.description: Terminal failure state path arrives at

traces.description: R*/AC* ids this flow realizes; R* = full slice requirement set; AC* = aPRD oracles happy path demonstrably reaches

honors_inv.description: Cross-slice invariants the drawn path stays inside

seam_coverage.description: One entry per foundational seam in skeleton_seams[] array order; skeleton mode only

seam.description: Foundation-cut seam name (e.g. ingress, domain, persistence, primary_external_integration)

in_flow.description: F* id this seam is crossed in

via.description: CT* path reaches this seam through; null for entry seam or external boundary

skeleton_fidelity.description: H14 — increment composes against frozen contracts, never reshapes (increment mode)

reused_contracts_walked.description: Frozen CT* ids this flow composes against

reshaped_contracts.description: Frozen CT* reshaped; MUST be empty

redrawn_flows.description: Frozen F* re-walked/redrawn; MUST be empty

structural_defects.description: Flow can't be drawn: missing/wrong CT* or uncovered seam; each {flow, gap, missing_or_wrong_ct, route}; empty on clean run

frame_conflicts.description: Flow reveals bad foundational decision; each {flow, finding, breaks_adr, route}; empty on clean run

aprd_defects.description: Flow reveals ambiguous/contradictory WHAT; each {flow, finding, ref, route}; empty on clean run

flow_counts.description: Counts derived by walking actual flow
